mapper.select: SELECT * FROM page_permission_item WHERE platform = #{platform} ORDER BY node_type, path_or_route, node_key
SELECT * FROM page_permission_item ORDER BY platform, node_type, path_or_route, node_key
SELECT * FROM page_permission_item WHERE node_key = #{nodeKey} LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM page_permission_item WHERE platform = #{platform} AND path_or_route = #{pathOrRoute} ORDER BY CASE WHEN node_type = 'ENTRY' AND entry_source = 'sidebar' THEN 0 WHEN node_type = 'ENTRY' THEN 1 WHEN node_type = 'PAGE' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, node_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO page_permission_item( platform, node_key, node_type, display_name, path_or_route, entry_source, min_role, default_min_role, enabled, parent_node_key, chain_key, auto_discovered, manual_override, last_discovered_at ) VALUES ( #{platform}, #{nodeKey}, #{nodeType}, #{displayName}, #{pathOrRoute}, #{entrySource}, #{minRole}, #{defaultMinRole}, #{enabled}, #{parentNodeKey}, #{chainKey}, 1, 0, #{lastDiscoveredAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE node_type = VALUES(node_type), display_name = VALUES(display_name), path_or_route = VALUES(path_or_route), entry_source = VALUES(entry_source), default_min_role = VALUES(default_min_role), min_role = IF(manual_override = 1, min_role, VALUES(min_role)), enabled = IF(manual_override = 1, enabled, VALUES(enabled)), parent_node_key = VALUES(parent_node_key), chain_key = VALUES(chain_key), auto_discovered = 1, last_discovered_at = VALUES(last_discovered_at), updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE page_permission_item SET min_role = #{minRole}, enabled = #{enabled}, manual_override = 1, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE node_key = #{nodeKey}
UPDATE page_permission_item SET min_role = default_min_role, enabled = 1, manual_override = 0, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE platform = #{platform}
